# /fdd

> Assemble or extend the project's **domain** integration FDD (per [ADR-0006](../../../design/adr/0006-doc-scope-domain-vs-feature.md)). Each new interface adds a feature-tagged structural section + rows in the interface catalogue.

## Usage

```
/fdd [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/spec.md` (`SPEC_APPROVED` APPROVED)
- [templates/fdd.template.md](../../templates/fdd.template.md)
- `project.config.yaml integration.*`

## Execution flow

1. Resolve target: `projects/{p}/integration/fdd.md`. Bootstrap from template if absent.
2. For the current feature, additive merge:
   - **Structural** sub-section per new interface or pattern instance (one per Function / Logic App / topic / queue / ADF pipeline) with `<!-- feature-id: {slug} -->`
   - **Table-shaped** rows in: interface catalogue, throughput / latency matrix, error-handling matrix, security model matrix, NFR mapping
3. FDD sections (per [design/agents/integration.md § /fdd assembly](../../../design/agents/integration.md)):
   - §1 Business context
   - §2 Cross-agent dependencies
   - §3 Interface catalogue (table)
   - §4 Per-pattern detail (structural sub-sections — one per interface)
   - §5 NFR matrix per feature
   - §6 Security model matrix
   - §7 Observability surface
   - §8 Open Items roll-up
4. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/fdd-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/fdd-review.checklist.md); BLOCKERs fail the write.
5. Run `doc_lint`.
6. `currentStates += FDD_DRAFT`.

## Concurrency

Disjoint section-blocks across features don't conflict; appended rows don't conflict. Same-section collisions flagged by `doc_lint`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/fdd.md` (additive at section/row level)
